# DejaViewed

> Curated catalog of AI tools, techniques, tutorials, and art references sourced from Instagram saved collections.

## What is DejaViewed?

DejaViewed is a searchable, filterable catalog of 334+ curated posts across 8 collections. Each entry is classified by tier (S/A/B/C), type (art, technique, tool, tutorial, resource, etc.), and tagged with tools, techniques, domains, and art-specific metadata (medium, style tags, subject matter).

## Collections

- **AI1-AI5**: AI tools, techniques, tutorials, repos, and resources
- **Quant**: Algorithmic trading, backtesting, quantitative finance
- **Art Inspiration**: Visual art and design references
- **Art I Like**: Personal art favorites -- sculpture, painting, photography, mixed media

## API Endpoints

- [/api/catalog.json](/api/catalog.json) -- Full catalog with all 334 entries
- [/api/creators.json](/api/creators.json) -- 213 creators with post counts and tier/type distribution
- [/api/tools.json](/api/tools.json) -- Tool, technique, and domain indices mapping to entry IDs
- [/api/collections.json](/api/collections.json) -- Collection summaries with stats

## Data Schema

Each entry has:
- id, title, url, creator, date
- type: art | design | technique | tool | tutorial | resource | repo | news | demo | platform | guide | inspiration | uiux
- tier: S (reference-grade) | A (strong) | B (useful) | C (vibe-only)
- collection: ai1-ai5 | quant | art-inspiration | art-i-like
- tools[], techniques[], domains[] -- searchable tags
- medium (art): oil | acrylic | 3d | photo | digital | drawing | sculpture | etc.
- style_tags[] (art): specific visual style descriptors
- summary: 1-2 sentence description
- thumb: thumbnail image path

## For Full Data

See [/llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt) for the complete catalog dump.
